title: 1.1: Reorders the outer loop body of `processSupersedesManagers` in `lib/workers/repository/extract/supersedes.ts` to check for superseding managers configuration before accessing package files
1.2: Reduces the maximum nesting depth of the package file filtering logic in `processSupersedesManagers` in `lib/workers/repository/extract/supersedes.ts`

1.3: Renames all 4 verbose local variables (`supersedesManagers`, `supercedingPackageFileNames`, `supercededManagerResults`, `supercededManager`) in `processSupersedesManagers` in `lib/workers/repository/extract/supersedes.ts` to names that no longer use the `superceding` or `superceded` prefixes
1.4: Replaces the compound negation in the filter callback of `processSupersedesManagers` in `lib/workers/repository/extract/supersedes.ts` with separate filter conditions

4.1: Alters the filtering behavior of `processSupersedesManagers` (such as removing package files that have lock files, or keeping superseded package files without lock files that overlap with the superseding manager's file list)
4.2: Modifies any testing logic in `lib/workers/repository/extract/supersedes.spec.ts` or any other test file
